titleStmt.title: SII 19.335: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 335. (A.R. No. 196 of 1929.) KAṆḌARĀDITTAM, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE DOOR-JAMB AT THE NORTHERN ENTRANCE INTO THE CENTRAL SHRINE, CHOKKANĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers a sale, by Kāppiyaṉ Vāsudevaṉ Seṭṭi of Perunāḷalūr, residing at Śrī-Amaravikramachchēri (quarter) of Śrī-Kaṇḍarāditta-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya on the northern bank of the river, of (the right of worship in the temple together with) his share of emolument in land wet and dry, house, and (other income like ?) śrāvaṇai, iḍukūru and paḍukūru belonging to him in common with others (śadukkam) (by order of the king) as śāsanabaddha, for an agreed amount in gold, to one Brahmādharāyaṉ alias Ātti[ra*]yaṉ Chakrapāṇi Śrī Vāsudēvaṉ. This gold is stated to have been of the quality tested by the standard weight and fineness of that obtaining at Koṟṟamaṅgalam in Maḻa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koppara
kecaripaṟkki yāṇṭu
13Āvatu vaṭakarai brahma
deyam śrīkaṇṭarātitta
caturvedimaṅkalattu
śrī Amaravikramacceri pe
runāḷalūr kāppiyaṉ
vāsudevaṉ ceṭṭiyeṉ vi
ṟṟukkuṭutta paṅku vilai
yāvaṇam Ivvūr Ic
ciṟukaccippeṭṭuk kantāṭai
kovaṭiccaturvedi Uḷḷiṭṭa ca
tukkattu veṇampi śā
sanabaddham paṭaittuṭai
ya paṅkku 1- m viṟṟukuṭuttu
kkoḷḷa Uṭaiya vilaip
poruḷ tiyppokkuc ce
mpoṉ kaḻañcilp per
tturaiyum tuḷaiyu
m vaḻuvāttu maḻanāṭ
ṭu brahmadeyam koṟṟa
maṅkalattu Ūrāṭukal
lāl Emmilicainta vi
laipporuḷ Āvaṇak
kaḷattille Aṟak
koṇṭu Ippaṅku 1- m cuṭṭi
vanta Akamaṉaiyum �
�(rā)vaṇaiyum Iṭukūṟu
m paṭukūṟu puṉcey
yum meṉceyyum
parāṟettip peṟum ma
ṟṟum Ivvoru paṅku
m cuṭṭi vanta Uṭum
poṭi yāmaitavaḻnta
tepper(p)eṭṭatukkum E
mmilicainta vilaip
poruḷḷukku viṟṟu vilai
yāvaṇañ ceytuku
ṭutteṉ brahmādhirāya
nākiya Āttirayaṉ cakrapā
ṇi śrīvāsudevaṉu
kku kāppiyaṉ vāsudeva
ṉ ceṭṭiyeṉ Ippaṅku
kku Ituvey vilaiyā
vaṇamum poruḷmāva
ṟutip poruḷccilavo
laiyum Ituve yā
vatākavum Ituvalla
tu veṟu poruḷmāva
ṟuti poruḷccilavo
lai kāṭṭakkaṭavaṉallā
tāṉākavumippari
coṭṭi Ippaṅkum viṟ
ṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu
ṉ pe
Ivar
paṇik
ka Iv
vilai
yāvaṇa
m Eḻu
tiṉe
ṉ kāṉā
ṭṭukko
kūt
taṉāṭi
yeṉ
Ivai
Eṉ
ṉeḻut
tu
Ippa
ṭi Aṟi
veṉ
ṇa
mpi
ūr tiru
veṇ
kāṭaṉ krama
vitta
ṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 19.335 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
